summary.en: Australia commonly uses the AS/NZS ISO 8124 series for toy chemical safety evidence, including migration of certain elements from accessible toy materials. Lead, cadmium, chromium, mercury, arsenic, antimony, barium, and selenium are typical heavy-metal elements requiring attention, especially in paints, coatings, plastics, modelling compounds, and scraped-off materials.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚通常使用AS/NZS ISO 8124系列作为玩具化学安全证据，包括可触及玩具材料中特定元素迁移。铅、镉、铬、汞、砷、锑、钡和硒是需要重点关注的典型重金属元素，尤其适用于油漆、涂层、塑料、造型材料和刮取材料。
summary.zht: 澳洲通常使用AS/NZS ISO 8124系列作為玩具化學安全證據，包括可觸及玩具材料中特定元素遷移。鉛、鎘、鉻、汞、砷、銻、鋇和硒是需要重點關注的典型重金屬元素，尤其適用於油漆、塗層、塑膠、造型材料和刮取材料。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS ISO 8124.3 — Safety of toys — Migration of certain elements
Australian Consumer Law — product safety provisions

summary.en: GB 6675.3 covers migration of certain elements and is aligned with ISO 8124-3. China export manufacturers often have GB 6675.3 or ISO 8124-3 data, but reports must be checked for edition, material categories, detection limits, sample identity, and whether the results support the Australian supplier's claims.
summary.zh: GB 6675.3涵盖特定元素迁移，并与ISO 8124-3对齐。中国出口制造商通常具备GB 6675.3或ISO 8124-3数据，但必须核查报告版本、材料类别、检出限、样品身份以及结果是否支持澳大利亚供应商的声明。
summary.zht: GB 6675.3涵蓋特定元素遷移，並與ISO 8124-3對齊。中國出口製造商通常具備GB 6675.3或ISO 8124-3數據，但必須核查報告版本、材料類別、檢出限、樣品身份以及結果是否支持澳洲供應商的聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.3-2014 — Safety of toys — Migration of certain elements
ISO 8124-3 — Safety of toys — Migration of certain elements

gap.en: The key gap is ensuring the heavy-metal report is current, product-specific, and usable in Australia. Painted or coated components, recycled plastics, low-cost pigments, and metal accessories should receive targeted lead and heavy-metal screening even when a generic factory report is available.
gap.zh: 关键差距在于确保重金属报告为现行版本、针对具体产品且可用于澳大利亚。即使已有工厂通用报告，涂漆或涂层部件、再生塑料、低成本颜料和金属配件仍应进行有针对性的铅及重金属筛查。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在於確保重金屬報告為現行版本、針對具體產品且可用於澳洲。即使已有工廠通用報告，塗漆或塗層部件、再生塑膠、低成本顏料和金屬配件仍應進行有針對性的鉛及重金屬篩查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated by an applicable Australian mandatory standard or needed to demonstrate safe supply under Australian Consumer Law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered China toy categories — GB 6675.3 / CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Heavy-metal evidence should not be treated as a one-time factory generic. For Australia, keep product-level AS/NZS ISO 8124.3 or ISO 8124-3 evidence that clearly covers all accessible materials and coatings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】重金属证据不应被视为一次性的工厂通用文件。面向澳大利亚，应保留产品层级的AS/NZS ISO 8124.3或ISO 8124-3证据，并清楚覆盖所有可触及材料和涂层。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】重金屬證據不應被視為一次性的工廠通用文件。面向澳洲，應保留產品層級的AS/NZS ISO 8124.3或ISO 8124-3證據，並清楚覆蓋所有可觸及材料和塗層。
